name: data-gateway
description: Gate external RPC access to a workbook: declare request-writable / request-readable blocks and per-cell validation rules

scripts.build: vite build && vite build --config vite.runtime.config.ts && yarn copy-to-public
scripts.copy-to-public: rm -rf ../../public/data-gateway && mkdir -p ../../public/data-gateway && cp index.html ../../public/data-gateway/index.html && cp manifest.json ../../public/data-gateway/manifest.json && cp dist/data-gateway.js ../../public/data-gateway/data-gateway.js && cp dist/data-gateway.runtime.js ../../public/data-gateway/data-gateway.runtime.js

author: Jeremy He
